sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Rithm Property Trust sets May payouts for common and preferred shares
feed.summary: Rithm Property Trust Inc. (NYSE: RPT) announced its Board of Directors has declared first-quarter 2026 common and preferred stock dividends. A cash dividend of $0.36 per share of common stock will be payable on May 29, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 15, 2026. Additionally, a Series C preferred stock dividend of $0.6171875 per share is payable on May 15, 2026, to preferred stockholders of record on May 1, 2026.

feed.title: Public Service Enterprise Group Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.67 a Share, Payable June 30 to Holders of Record June 9
feed.summary: Public Service Enterprise Group (PSEG) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.67 per share. The dividend is payable on June 30 to shareholders of record as of June 9. PSEG operates primarily in electricity and natural gas distribution, electricity transmission, and power generation.

feed.title: Council committee advances $12 million in city incentives for Johnson & Johnson expansion
feed.summary: A City Council Finance Committee has approved $12 million in city incentives for Johnson & Johnson Vision Care. This funding will support the construction of a new packaging distribution facility in Northwest Jacksonville and the installation of high-tech equipment at its Southside campus, with a total investment by J&J of $550 million. The incentives are structured as two Recapture Enhanced Value Grants, conditional on maintaining a specific number of jobs.

feed.title: Prudential keeps Japan life insurance sales frozen for 6 more months
feed.summary: Prudential Financial, Inc. (PRU) has extended the voluntary suspension of new sales activity at its Japanese subsidiary, Prudential of Japan (POJ), by an additional 180 days. This decision was made because the necessary operational, governance, and organizational changes are more complex and extensive than initially anticipated. The suspension aims to allow POJ to implement reforms across key areas to prevent misconduct, strengthen accountability, and transform its sales model, ensuring long-term customer outcomes while maintaining financial soundness and servicing existing policies.

feed.title: Paycom to post March-quarter results after the close on May 6
feed.summary: Paycom Software, Inc. (NYSE: PAYC) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on May 6. The company will also host a conference call at 5 p.m. Eastern on the same day to discuss the results. Interested parties can access the call via a dial-in number or through a webcast available on Paycom's investor relations website.

feed.title: For 225,000 Iowa customers, Earth Day starts with fixing leaks
feed.summary: Iowa American Water marked Earth Day by emphasizing water conservation, infrastructure stewardship, and community engagement. The utility, serving approximately 225,000 customers, encouraged simple household actions like fixing leaks and proper disposal of medications to protect water resources. Additionally, they highlighted National Prescription Drug Take Back Day for safe medication disposal.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics targets exiting 2026 at 90% capacity at Aluminum Dynamics while reaffirming $650M-$700M through-cycle EBITDA
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics is targeting its Aluminum Dynamics plant to reach 90% capacity by the end of 2026. The company also reaffirmed its through-cycle EBITDA forecast for the plant to be between $650 million and $700 million.

feed.title: Google honors Iron Mountain for AI tools managing 100M media assets
feed.summary: Iron Mountain has been named the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year for Business Applications: Media & Entertainment, recognizing its innovative use of AI tools to manage over 100 million media assets. The company leverages Google Cloud's Vertex AI and Vision Warehouse, combined with its own InSight DXP AI platform, to help media and entertainment clients with security, accessibility, and monetization of their archives. This partnership notably supports clients like the McLaren Mastercard Formula 1 Team in digitizing their heritage for enhanced fan engagement and future insights.

feed.title: Database architecture powers Oracle’s trusted AI strategy
feed.summary: Oracle is advocating for database architecture as a trusted foundation for AI, highlighted by its redesigned Oracle Database and the new AI Data Platform. The company emphasizes the importance of embedding trust through machine learning, vector search, and advanced analytics directly into its data platform, especially as enterprises move towards agentic AI. Key insights from the Oracle Data Deep Dive event include the database becoming central to agentic AI, the IT industry moving towards distributed AI, and the increased importance of database security due to “vibe coding.”

feed.title: United Airlines Cuts Full-Year Forecast on Rising Fuel Costs
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings Inc. has significantly cut its full-year profit forecast, now expecting adjusted earnings of $7 to $11 per share, down from a previous range of $12 to $14. This reduction is attributed to surging fuel costs, which have been impacted by ongoing conflict in the Middle East. The revised outlook highlights the financial pressures global carriers are facing due to geopolitical events affecting oil prices.

feed.title: Halliburton Beats Q1 2026 Earnings Estimates by 10% — Here’s What It Means for the Stock
feed.summary: Halliburton (HAL) reported Q1 2026 earnings, significantly beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $0.55 on revenues of $5.40 billion. This strong performance, which included a 125.98% increase in net income year-over-year, was driven by international diversification, particularly robust growth in Latin America, which offset declines in the Middle East due to geopolitical factors. The company’s ability to exceed expectations despite volatile oil markets and regional conflicts highlights its operational resilience and strategic positioning for continued momentum.

feed.title: Apple became a $4 trillion company under Tim Cook. What happens now?
feed.summary: Tim Cook, who led Apple to become a $4 trillion company, will step down as CEO in September, with John Ternus, senior vice president of hardware engineering, set to succeed him. Ternus, who has been with Apple since 2001, is expected to lead the company's pivot into generative artificial intelligence, an area where Apple has lagged behind competitors. Cook will transition to executive chairman of the board.

feed.title: FedEx settles charge it denied telework accommodations to workers with disabilities
feed.summary: FedEx has agreed to pay $280,000 to settle a disability discrimination complaint filed by the U.S. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission. The complaint alleged FedEx revoked telework accommodations for New York City-based dispatchers with disabilities in early 2023, despite in-office presence not being an essential job function. In addition to the monetary settlement for three affected workers, FedEx will provide annual ADA training, report accommodation requests to the EEOC, and reinstate a former employee.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley reiterates Circle Internet stock rating at Equalweight By Investing.com
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reiterated an Equalweight rating and an $80.00 price target for Circle Internet Group (NYSE:CRCL) stock, noting the shares are currently trading above this target and appear overvalued according to InvestingPro. The firm highlighted ongoing legislative efforts regarding stablecoin yield and issues such as DeFi regulation and liability for illicit activity as incremental headwinds. Additionally, recent news includes Circle's new Managed Payments service and analyst actions from Freedom Capital Markets and Compass Point.

feed.title: Paycom Software (NYSE:PAYC) Price Target Cut to $183.00 by Analysts at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group has cut its price target for Paycom Software (NYSE:PAYC) from $210.00 to $183.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 40% upside. This adjustment aligns with similar reductions from other brokers, leading to a MarketBeat consensus of "Hold" with an average target of $168.79. Despite a slight EPS beat and 10.2% year-over-year revenue growth, Paycom's shares are trading below their 200-day average and 52-week high, reflecting cautious sentiment among analysts and institutional investors.

feed.title: Fuel bill rose $340M, yet United still earned $0.9B in Q1
feed.summary: United Airlines reported strong Q1 2026 results despite a significant increase in fuel expenses, achieving diluted EPS of $2.14 and total operating revenue of $14.6 billion. The airline generated $0.9 billion in pre-tax earnings and $2.9 billion in free cash flow, while also strengthening its balance sheet by reducing debt. United is strategically adjusting capacity, investing in fleet enhancements, and improving customer experience, including new seating options and expanded Wi-Fi.

feed.title: Biogen Inc. Secures Global Rights To Felzartamab Through Greater China Deal With TJ Biopharma
feed.summary: Biogen Inc. has acquired the exclusive worldwide development and commercialization rights to felzartamab by securing TJ Biopharma's rights in the Greater China Region. This deal, valued at up to $850 million including an upfront payment and potential milestones, expands Biogen's immunology pipeline and allows it to lead the development, manufacturing, and commercial efforts for the CD38-directed antibody in a key global market. Felzartamab is currently in Phase 3 clinical studies for multiple immune-mediated diseases, including IgA nephropathy and primary membranous nephropathy.

feed.title: Itron started with sell-equivalent rating at Raymond James as metering deployments moderate
feed.summary: Raymond James has initiated coverage on Itron (ITRI) with an "Underperform" rating, equivalent to a sell, citing moderating metering deployments and a perceived full valuation. Analyst Jonathan Braatz highlighted that Itron's recent strong performance, driven by significant deployment levels, is expected to normalize, leading to a less favorable risk-reward profile for the stock. This initiation suggests a cautious outlook for Itron's share price in the near term.

feed.title: Amazon’s AI infrastructure push with Anthropic lifts outlook, but profitability debate grows
feed.summary: Amazon's partnership with Anthropic, involving a commitment of over $100 billion for Amazon Web Services and a further $25 billion investment in Anthropic, signals a significant expansion of Amazon's AI ambitions. This deal, along with a similar arrangement with OpenAI, highlights growing confidence in Amazon's custom silicon strategy, particularly its Trainium processors, and strengthens AWS's long-term revenue visibility. However, the substantial capital expenditure required for these deals is raising questions about profitability and returns for investors.

feed.title: Top Waste Management Stocks Worth Watching - April 21st
feed.summary: MarketBeat has identified Waste Management (WM), GFL Environmental (GFL), and Custom Truck One Source (CTOS) as top waste management stocks, citing their high dollar trading volume. These companies are considered defensive investments due to stable cash flows from long-term contracts but face risks from regulatory changes and capital-intensive operations. Each company specializes in different aspects of waste management and related services.

feed.title: TFI International to Hold Annual Meeting of Shareholders
feed.summary: TFI International Inc. announced that it will hold its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Monday, April 27, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. EDT at its head office in St-Laurent, Québec. Shareholders can participate by telephone conference call, with a proxy voting deadline of April 23, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. EDT. Meeting materials are available on the company's website and regulatory filings platforms.

feed.title: Ball upgraded, Graphic Packaging downgraded at Raymond James (BALL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Raymond James upgraded Ball Corporation (BALL) to Outperform from Market Perform, citing the company's beverage can business benefiting from durable industry trends. Conversely, Graphic Packaging (GPK) was downgraded due to concerns about its growth rate and a potential shift in investor preference towards defensive cyclical stocks.

feed.title: What to know about Starbucks’ Nashville job search
feed.summary: Starbucks has initiated its recruitment drive for 2,000 jobs at its new "eastern U.S. headquarters" in downtown Nashville, located in the Peabody Union development. The company seeks local talent for the majority of these six-figure positions. The article highlights the skills Starbucks is looking for, the expected origin of its Nashville-based employees, and salary information.

feed.title: Itron started with Sell-equivalent rating at Raymond James as metering deployments moderate
feed.summary: Itron (ITRI) received an Underperform rating from Raymond James, causing its stock to drop by 2.9% on Tuesday. Raymond James believes that Itron's business, which provides energy and water resource management services, is moderating from what they consider an unsustainably high level of advanced metering deployments.

feed.title: Eastman Chemical (EMN) Gets a $1 Price Target Cut from Citi
feed.summary: Citi has lowered its price target for Eastman Chemical Company (EMN) to $83 from $84 but maintained a Buy rating. This adjustment follows Citi's Q1 chemicals preview. Conversely, JPMorgan upgraded EMN to Overweight with an $80 price target, citing a bullish 2026 outlook due to anticipated EBITDA growth and considers current valuations an attractive entry point.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Q1 earnings set to show resilience amid uncertain backdrop | NYSE:KO
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is expected to report resilient Q1 earnings, with UBS projecting $0.81 EPS, in line with consensus. Organic sales growth is anticipated to be strong, driven by both volume and pricing, positioning the company as a stable performer in consumer staples. UBS maintains a 'Buy' rating with a $90 price target, highlighting improving investor sentiment due to Coca-Cola's predictable earnings amid broader market uncertainty.

feed.title: Quantum Momentum Builds. Why IonQ and Xanadu Stocks Are This Analyst’s Top Picks.
feed.summary: An analyst from Northland Capital Markets has initiated coverage on quantum computing companies, selecting IonQ and Xanadu as top picks with an Outperform rating for IonQ. This move indicates a growing enthusiasm within the financial community for the quantum computing sector. The article highlights the increasing interest among analysts in this emerging technological field.

feed.title: Amazon shakes GLP-1 race as Eli Lilly, Novo Nordisk stocks fall
feed.summary: Amazon has entered the weight-loss treatment market with a new "GLP-1 Management Program" through its One Medical arm, integrating care, pharmacy, and delivery. This move positions Amazon as a significant competitor to pharmaceutical giants Eli Lilly and Novo Nordisk, whose stocks declined following the announcement. Amazon's strategy focuses on convenience, accessibility, and competitive pricing, offering an integrated system for long-term weight management.

feed.title: Director LuAnn Datesh updates ERIE (ERIE) holdings with new deferred share credits
feed.summary: Director LuAnn Datesh of ERIE INDEMNITY CO (ERIE) has reported an update to her holdings, which now include 410 shares of Class A common stock and 4,137.281 Directors' Deferred Compensation Share Credits. These share credits, acquired under the company’s deferred compensation and stock plans, represent the right to receive an equivalent number of Class A common shares upon the termination of her directorship. The transaction, classified as an "other" transaction (code J), is a routine plan-related update rather than an open-market purchase or sale.

feed.title: UBS Heightens Expectations for Corteva (CTVA) with an $8 Price Target Raise
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Corteva (CTVA) from $80 to $88, maintaining a Neutral rating, signalling confidence in the company's future growth. This follows a similar move by Argus, which raised its price target to $91 with a Buy rating, citing Corteva's strong industry track record and effective cost-reduction strategies. Corteva, an agriculture technology company, holds a consensus Buy rating from 28 analysts.

feed.title: MSCI (NYSE: MSCI) Q1 2026 revenue jumps 14% as ETF AUM grows
feed.summary: MSCI Inc. reported strong Q1 2026 results with operating revenues increasing 14.1% to $850.8 million, driven by growth in Index products and asset-based fees, including a 37.7% rise in average AUM for ETFs linked to MSCI equity indexes. Net income jumped 40.7% to $406.0 million, and diluted EPS rose to $5.53, benefiting from a significant discrete tax benefit. The company also continued its capital return program, repurchasing $399.3 million in stock and declaring dividends of $2.05 per share.

feed.title: [424B2] BARCLAYS BANK PLC Prospectus Supplement
feed.summary: Barclays Bank PLC is offering $2,495,000 of Autocallable Contingent Coupon Buffered Notes due April 20, 2029, linked to the common shares of Alcoa (AA), Morgan Stanley (MS), and Seagate (STX). These notes feature a monthly Contingent Coupon of $13.333 per $1,000 (16.00% per annum nominal rate), payable only if each underlying stock meets specified barrier tests on observation dates, and are subject to automatic redemption after the first year. Investors face a 20.00% buffer, potentially exposing them to up to 80.00% principal loss in certain downside scenarios, and the notes are unsecured obligations of Barclays subject to U.K. bail-in powers.

feed.title: Yardeni Says Buy Energy Stocks Before Iran Ceasefire Ends - ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP), Chevron (NYSE:CVX)
feed.summary: Ed Yardeni of Yardeni Research has upgraded the Energy sector to overweight, arguing that the recent selloff in oil stocks presents a buying opportunity. He believes that the market is mispricing the duration of the Iran conflict, and that oil prices will not return to pre-war levels due to damage to infrastructure and increased transit costs through the Strait of Hormuz. Yardeni projects Brent crude to trade in a higher range of $75 to $95 post-war, with energy stocks currently undervalued at 16 times forward earnings compared to the broader S&P 500.

feed.title: AutoCallable Contingent Coupon Notes — Barclays (DJP) linked to ARES stock
feed.summary: Barclays Bank PLC is offering AutoCallable Contingent Coupon Notes linked to Ares Management Corporation common stock (ARES). These Notes, maturing on April 27, 2028, pay quarterly contingent coupons of $37.50 per $1,000 (15.00% annually) if observation thresholds are met and feature an automatic call option. Investors are exposed to the full downside of the reference stock if its final value falls below 48.10% of the initial value, with an estimated initial value between $921.60 and $971.60 per $1,000, below the issue price.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices Inc Stock (AMD) Moved Up by 3.23% on Apr 21: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc (AMD) saw its stock rise by 3.23% on April 21, driven by a Stifel Nicolaus analyst upgrade to a Buy rating with an increased price target. The positive

feed.title: TransDigm Group Inc Stock (TDG) Moved Down by 5.57% on Apr 21: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: TransDigm Group Inc (TDG) stock fell 5.57% due to investor concerns over the company's significant new debt issuance for an acquisition and share repurchases, despite strong preliminary financial results. Insider selling and institutional stake reductions have further contributed to market worries about valuation and financial flexibility. Analysts largely maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating, but debt and interest expense risks are overshadowing positive operational outlooks.

feed.title: Qualcomm Stock Is Down 20% in 2026. Is the Market Missing the Bigger Story?
feed.summary: Qualcomm (QCOM) stock is down 20% in 2026 due to a DRAM shortage impacting Android smartphone production and Apple's phasing out of Qualcomm modems. Despite these headwinds, Qualcomm reported record Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue, with strong growth in its automotive and IoT segments, though these aren't yet large enough to fully offset smartphone pressures. Analyst sentiment is split, with some recognizing the diversification into automotive and AI edge, while others remain concerned about the smartphone market's impact.

feed.title: ALB Maintains by Citigroup -- Price Target Raised to $210
feed.summary: Citigroup analyst Patrick Cunningham has maintained a Neutral rating on Albemarle (ALB) while raising the price target to $210.00 from $190.00. The company is considered significantly overvalued by GuruFocus's GF Value™ at $77.81 compared to its current price of $196.74, despite having a moderate GF Score™ of 73/100, which indicates strengths in profitability and growth. Insider activity shows $4.3 million in sales over the last three months, suggesting a lack of confidence among insiders.

feed.title: Trump praises Cook, revives 'Tim Apple' nickname
feed.summary: Former President Donald Trump praised Apple CEO Tim Cook after the announcement of Cook stepping down from his role. Trump recounted their "long and very nice relationship," including times he helped Cook with "fairly large problems" during his presidency, and humorously referred to his past "Tim Apple" gaffe. He concluded by calling Cook "an amazing manager and leader" and "an incredible guy."

feed.title: Karyopharm’s myelofibrosis trial selected for ASCO presentation
feed.summary: Karyopharm Therapeutics Inc. announced that its Phase 3 SENTRY trial results for myelofibrosis will be presented at the American Society of Clinical Oncology Annual Meeting from May 29 to June 2. The presentation, featuring data on selinexor combined with ruxolitinib, will take place on June 2. Despite a 66% stock return over the past year, InvestingPro indicates the company is slightly overvalued, and analysts have varying price targets reflecting uncertainty about the trial's commercial potential.

feed.title: Fortinet Honored as 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year for Workload Security
feed.summary: Fortinet has been recognized with the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Workload Security, highlighting its advancements in securing modern workloads within the Google Cloud ecosystem. The company's Fortinet cloud-native application protection platform (CNAPP) helps customers manage security across hybrid and multi-cloud environments, integrating capabilities like CSPM and workload protection. This award underscores Fortinet's ongoing collaboration with Google Cloud and its commitment to delivering integrated security solutions that enhance cloud operations.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) director adds 39 deferred share credits in Form 4
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity director Salvatore Correnti reported the acquisition of 39.475 Directors' Deferred Compensation Share Credits, valued at $253.63 each, as part of his routine compensation. These credits increase his total to 2,765.603 and represent the right to receive an equivalent number of Class A common shares upon the end of his board service. Correnti also directly holds 320 Class A common shares.

feed.title: ETN (NYSE: ETN) Rule 144 notice lists 10,617, 3,647 and 2,854-share sales
feed.summary: Eaton Corp plc (ETN) has filed a Rule 144 notice indicating planned sales of common stock through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC. The notice details sales of 10,617, 3,647, and 2,854 shares, corresponding to options granted on March 1, 2024, February 28, 2024, and February 26, 2025, respectively, all with an entry date of April 21, 2026. The filing also mentions 387,900,000 shares alongside the April 21, 2026 date.

feed.title: Citigroup Cuts Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) Price Target to $37.00
feed.summary: Citigroup lowered its price target for Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) from $41.00 to $37.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating on the stock. This adjustment suggests a potential upside of 8.47% from its previous close, while other analysts have offered mixed opinions, resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $42.56. Enphase Energy recently surpassed quarterly EPS estimates despite a 10.3% year-over-year revenue decline, with the stock currently trading around $34.11 and holding a market capitalization of approximately $4.5 billion.

feed.title: Fortinet Wins 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Workload Security
feed.summary: Fortinet has been awarded the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Workload Security, recognized for its FortiCNAPP platform. This platform helps organizations secure cloud workloads across various environments by providing unified visibility, risk prioritization, and protection. The award highlights Fortinet's successful collaboration with Google Cloud in enhancing cloud security for customers.

feed.title: ERIE (ERIE) director adds deferred share credits and updates holdings
feed.summary: Eugene C. Connell, a director at ERIE Indemnity (ERIE), has updated his holdings by acquiring 39,475 Directors' Deferred Compensation Share Credits. These share credits, valued at $253.63 each, grant him the right to receive an equivalent number of Class A common shares upon his departure from the board. The filing indicates no open-market purchases or sales, and also details his direct ownership of 17,433.246 Class A shares and 2,462.602 Class A shares held by his children, for which he disclaims beneficial ownership.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Douglas Milanes Sells Shares of Darden Restaurants Inc (DRI)
feed.summary: Douglas Milanes, the Senior Vice President and Chief Supply Chain Officer at Darden Restaurants Inc (DRI), recently sold 3,620 shares of the company's stock. This transaction is part of a broader trend where Milanes has sold 15,568 shares over the past year with no purchases, aligning with overall insider selling at DRI. The stock is currently deemed fairly valued based on its GF Value, with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.98.

feed.title: Autodesk remains mostly insulated from AI disruption, Middle East conflict: Oppenheimer
feed.summary: Oppenheimer believes Autodesk (ADSK) is largely insulated from the ongoing AI disruption and the Middle East conflict. The company's existing advantages in AI and its diversification strategy are cited as key reasons for its resilience against these external factors.

feed.title: NetApp lands seventh Google Cloud award after expanding storage tools
feed.summary: NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP) has received its seventh Google Cloud Infrastructure Modernization Partner of the Year for Storage Award, celebrating its collaborative efforts with Google Cloud. The award recognizes NetApp's success in helping customers modernize their infrastructure and run enterprise workloads using Google Cloud NetApp Volumes, a first-party service developed through their partnership. Recent expansions include enhanced block storage capabilities and tighter integration with Google Cloud services like Google Cloud Assist and Gemini CLI Extensions, simplifying data integration for AI applications.

feed.title: Court rejects Travelers' pollution exclusion appeal in Syngenta paraquat battle
feed.summary: Delaware's highest court has rejected Travelers' appeal, upholding the insurer's obligation to defend Syngenta in over 10,000 paraquat injury lawsuits. The court found that the pollution exclusion clause in policies from 1974-1977 applies only to traditional environmental pollution, not the paraquat claims. While Travelers received a partial win regarding defense costs reducing policy limits in later policies, the Superior Court's ruling stands for now, and the underlying litigation will continue.
